mnemonics: Ullman's Unified Universe: Understand Undecidability, Languages, Machines, Algorithms, and Non-computability.
keyPoints: Co-author of the seminal textbook 'Introduction to Automata Theory, Languages, and Computation'
Key contributor to the theory of formal languages, compilers, and database theory
His work helps define the fundamental limits of what can and cannot be computed
commonMistakes: Confusing Jeffrey D. Ullman with other computer scientists like Alfred Aho (his frequent co-author)
Assuming all concepts in the 'Dragon Book' (compilers) are solely his work; it was a collaboration with Aho and Sethi
